name: URI Fix
summary: Diagnose failed urirun URI chains and return safe repair or retry plans.
description: URI Fix is an operational connector for the urirun ecosystem. It reads a failed prompt/flow/result, classifies the failure, and returns a deterministic patch, retry payload, and recovery actions for issues such as missing node URLs, empty node selections, missing LLM model configuration, missing routes/connectors, transient node failures, stale files and invalid payloads. It does not perform privileged provisioning by itself; it emits a safe repair contract that the host/dashboard/node manager can apply.
useCases: Patch missing node_url for document sync and fs copy flows.
Turn raw URI errors into recovery actions.
